description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:6.10.0 Docker image. Define a single stage named deploy and a job called pages that runs in this stage. The pages job executes the shell commands `npm install` and `npm run build --wwwDir "public" --prod`, caches the `node_modules` directory, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. It is configured to run only on the master branch.
